meaning: n.基里姆地毯,花毯(产于土尔其,高加索及其附近地区,无毛绒的双面毯)
examples: You'll note that this type doesn't require any special Kilim code.
I am shown to a two-bed cave with kilim carpets on the floor – and mercifully stationary beds.
Methods containing the Pausable throws clause are processed at runtime by a scheduler, which is part of the Kilim library.
